insurance-boosters-platform.description: Complete insurance management platform with scalable monorepo architecture. End-to-end system including a frontend web app, Express REST API and backend services for quoting and workflow automation.
insurance-boosters-platform.problem: Insurance teams need a modern scalable platform to manage quotes, automated workflows and Twilio-based communications while integrating external APIs through a robust real-time backend.

multicotizador-seguros.description: Specialized frontend for multi-quote insurance comparison. Responsive interface built with Next.js 15 and Tailwind CSS, optimized for real-time comparison and PDF quote generation.
multicotizador-seguros.problem: End users need fast intuitive tools to compare multiple insurance quotes from different providers and generate PDF reports without technical friction.

voz-ciudadana.description: Multi-tenant SaaS platform for civic report management with messaging channel integrations and AI agents for classification and automated responses.
voz-ciudadana.problem: Municipal governments lack unified digital channels to efficiently receive and manage citizen reports.
voz-ciudadana.role: Full Stack Developer and System Architect

baklava-club-de-mar.description: Elegant responsive landing page for a beach club with premium visual design, image gallery, services section and contact form.
baklava-club-de-mar.problem: The club needed a professional digital presence that reflected its premium value proposition and attracted new members.

code-creatives.description: Web platform for a creative agency with project management, client portal, deliverable tracking and integrated communication.
code-creatives.problem: The agency handled projects manually, creating client friction and poor visibility into delivery status.

hunadchat.description: Multichannel messaging system with conversational AI agents, WhatsApp Business integration, automated workflows and an admin dashboard.
hunadchat.problem: Companies needed to centralize customer support across multiple channels with intelligent automated responses.

andejecruher-web.description: Professional portfolio built with Astro, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS to showcase full stack, SaaS, automation and AI development experience.
andejecruher-web.problem: Solves the need for a clear, fast and optimized professional presence to present technical background, value proposition and relevant projects to recruiters and potential clients.

url-shortener-api.description: REST API for URL shortening with unique code generation, redirects, edit/delete operations and usage metrics, built with a modular backend architecture.
url-shortener-api.problem: Addresses the use case of converting long links into manageable short URLs, including basic analytics and CRUD operations for lightweight services, MVPs or internal integrations.
